name: raycast-toolbox
title: Toolbox
description: Personal toolbox of Raycast commands — Apple Reminders from natural language, Slack status, and more.
author: dmitriyportenko

commands.name: parse-reminder
commands.title: Create ReMYnder
commands.subtitle: AI Reminder
commands.description: Type a reminder in natural language; AI parses and creates it.

commands.name: set-slack-status
commands.title: Set Slack Status
commands.subtitle: AI Status
commands.description: Set your Slack profile status with an expiration; AI parses natural language.

commands.name: clear-slack-status
commands.title: Clear Slack Status
commands.subtitle: AI Status
commands.description: Clear your Slack profile status immediately.

preferences.name: cliMode
preferences.title: AI CLI
preferences.description: Which headless CLI to use for parsing.

preferences.name: cliPath
preferences.title: CLI Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the CLI binary. Raycast does not inherit your shell PATH, so use the full path.

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Model
preferences.description: Model name passed to the CLI (codex --model, claude --model, gemini -m). Leave empty to use the CLI default.

preferences.name: defaultList
preferences.title: Default List
preferences.description: Name of the Reminders list to use when none is parsed.

preferences.name: timeoutSeconds
preferences.title: Parse Timeout (seconds)
preferences.description: Max wait for the CLI to return.

preferences.name: slackToken
preferences.title: Slack User OAuth Token
preferences.description: xoxp- token from a Slack app with users.profile:write scope. See docs/slack-setup.md for step-by-step setup.
